name: Casserole Apicius with Meat or Fish
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Cooked pork or chicken, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. For the pancakes: Beat 3 eggs and mix with flour, milk, and water to form a thin batter. Pour into a greased frying pan, spreading evenly. Cook over high heat until lightly browned.
2. Prepare the coked meat or fish by mixing with raw eggs, olive oil, celery seed, stock, white wine, and sweet wine. Heat the meats in this sauce, adding more liquid if needed. Thicken the sauce with flour.
3. Place a layer of cooked meat or fish in its sauce at the bottom of a greased casserole dish. Sprinkle with coarsely ground pepper and nuts.
4. Add another pancake on top. Fill the dish with layers of sauced meats, seasoned with pepper and nuts, alternating with pancakes.
5. Pierce a hole in the final pancake to allow steam to escape. Cover and bake uncovered at 375°F for 20-25 minutes until uniformly heated.
6. Serve sprinkled with extra pepper.
